subject: You have 3 new connection requests
body:
Hi Jeremiah,

You have 3 new connection requests waiting for you on LinkedIn.

1. Adaeze Okonkwo - Senior Data Scientist at MTN Nigeria
2. David Mensah - Software Engineer at Flutterwave
3. Priya Sharma - Product Manager at Microsoft

Accept these connections to grow your professional network. Your profile has also been viewed 47 times this week.

Best,
The LinkedIn Team

subject: MSc Dissertation Supervision Meeting - Urgent
body:
Dear Jeremiah,

I hope this message finds you well. I need to schedule an urgent meeting regarding your MSc dissertation submission. There are a few critical points we must address before the final deadline on April 30th.

Please confirm your availability for any of the following slots:
- Monday April 21, 2:00 PM - 4:00 PM
- Tuesday April 22, 10:00 AM - 12:00 PM
- Wednesday April 23, 3:00 PM - 5:00 PM

This meeting is mandatory. Please treat this with urgency.

Best regards,
Dr. Emeka Nwosu
Department of Computer Science

subject: URGENT: Your Account Has Been Suspended - Verify Now
body:
Dear Valued Customer,

Your Zenith Bank account has been temporarily SUSPENDED due to suspicious activity detected on your profile.

To restore access, you must verify your details IMMEDIATELY by clicking the link below:

http://zenith-verify-account.ru/login?token=8f3kL9

You must complete this within 24 HOURS or your account will be PERMANENTLY CLOSED.

Provide:
- Full name
- Account number
- ATM PIN
- Date of birth
- BVN

Zenith Bank Security Team
+234-800-FAKE-NUM

subject: Complete your certificate: 3 days left on your trial
body:
Hi Jeremiah,

Your Coursera Plus trial ends in 3 days. Don't let your progress go to waste!

You're 78% through the IBM Data Science Professional Certificate. Finish strong.

Upgrade now and get:
- Unlimited access to 7,000+ courses
- Shareable certificates for your LinkedIn profile
- Job-ready skills from top companies

Use code LEARN2025 for 20% off your first month.

Keep learning,
The Coursera Team

subject: Re: Employment Contract Amendment - Immediate Action Required
body:
Dear Jeremiah,

Following our board meeting yesterday, we have decided to amend the terms of your employment contract effective May 1st, 2025.

Key changes include:
1. Remote work policy revised to 2 days per week in-office
2. Annual performance bonus structure modified
3. Confidentiality clause updated

You are required to review, sign, and return the amended contract no later than April 25th. Failure to do so may affect your employment status.

The contract document is attached. Please escalate any concerns to HR immediately.

Regards,
Taiwo Adebayo
Chief Operations Officer
Tech Solutions

subject: [GitHub] A new public key was added to your account
body:
Hey jeremiahfavour,

A new public key was added to your GitHub account.

If you believe this is a mistake, please contact GitHub Support immediately at https://support.github.com.

Thanks,
The GitHub Team

subject: Confidential Business Proposal - $4.5 Million USD
body:
DEAR FRIEND,

I am Prince Babatunde Williams, son of the late Chief Emmanuel Williams, former oil minister of Nigeria. I am contacting you with a STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL business proposal.

I have inherited $4,500,000 USD that I need to transfer out of the country. I require a trusted foreign partner to receive this fund in their account. You will receive 35% ($1,575,000) as your share.

This transaction is 100% RISK FREE and LEGAL. All I need is your:
- Full name
- Bank account number
- Passport copy
- Phone number

Reply urgently to proceed. God bless you.

Prince Babatunde Williams

body:
